<!-- One or two sentences. Link an issue if there is one. -->

## Gate checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes for every package/app touched
- [ ] `npm test` passes for every package/app touched (no reduced test coverage)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes for any app touched
- [ ] Added a [changeset](../.changeset/README.md) if this changes a published-eventually
      `packages/*` library in a way that should version-bump it (`npx changeset add`)
- [ ] For UI/editor changes: actually exercised the change in a running app, not just tests
- [ ] For WGSL-emitting changes: validated on a real device where available, not just that
      the shader string assembles
